title: Will Shinji Ever Find Love In The End
display_title: Will Shinji Ever Find Love In The End
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Will Shinji Ever Find Love In The End? Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:28 pm Was originally [NO SPOILERS], but that crippled the thread a bit, so I've taken the liberty of changing that... -Reichu You choose (debate thread)

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:36 pm Why is a "no spoilers" thread in Q and Beyond? This is the designated "spoilers" section.

[]: Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:38 pm Um, Check there are like tons of em. U mad at me?

[]: Post by Na7e » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:40 pm Probably not. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:44 pm I mean If I were in the series I would try and make him happy. Like that one friend that only comes around in a life time and you never want to give him/her up. And show him hope/Happiness/fear. I would probably be the only one here that wants to help him. And I would have Shinji focus on his life and not others.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:46 pm MitsumuraKun51196 wrote: Um, Check there are like tons of em.

[]: Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:54 pm Ass U Me(Assume Lol Not insulting anybody But your making a real ass out Of you And me!! -------------------------------------------------------------------- Just sayin assuming Is one word you never ever ever!!! Want to use!

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:58 pm The question we should really be asking is: Does Shinji believe in love after tang? Can he feel something inside his plugsuit? Does he really not think it's strong enough. No! Does Shinji believe in love after tang?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 11:04 pm I assume that Shinji will never find love in the end.

[]: Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Jan 02, 2013 11:05 pm OH JESUS!! I hate that word. LOL

[]: Post by Darkwing » Wed Jan 02, 2013 11:28 pm I honestly don't see how I'm going to be able to discuss this without spoilers. So I'm just going to put a goofy reply in. Shinji will discover his love for dancing. Sadly he'll die doing the Tango De La Muerte, but he'll die happy.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 02, 2013 11:53 pm Darkwing wrote: I honestly don't see how I'm going to be able to discuss this without spoilers.

[]: Post by CJD » Thu Jan 03, 2013 5:49 am Yea, unfortunately we can't discuss the chances of love with any other character without getting into spoiler territory, but what I would say is that, given that this is Eva, and given the messages inherent in Eva, I'd say the safest bet is that he'll find love of himself at the least. Whether he also finds love with another character or not, well people have to watch 3.0 and 4.0 to find out.

[]: Post by Zeldafan888 » Thu Jan 03, 2013 6:26 am Not really considering that: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Chuckman » Thu Jan 03, 2013 11:08 am No, but he's going to end up making some kind of heroic sacrifice anyway and then we'll find out someone was secretly pining for him. I'm sure there will be some knife twisting, like a vision of his future children who will never be born, and who are also on fire.

[]: Post by Zeldafan888 » Thu Jan 03, 2013 11:20 am Chuckman wrote: No, but he's going to end up making some kind of heroic sacrifice anyway and then we'll find out someone was secretly pining for him. I'm sure there will be some knife twisting, like a vision of his future children who will never be born, and who are also on fire.

[]: Post by EvaBrothers » Thu Jan 03, 2013 2:24 pm I'm not sure. I (deliberately) know very little about 3.0, but if it's going to be somewhat like EoE, we'll never know. Open ends, huh? :) Honestly, it's why I love open ends: they leave it all to the reader/watcher/fan's imagination.

[]: Post by Redtophat » Thu Jan 03, 2013 2:29 pm I don't think he'll get into a romantic relationship with anyone in the cast, but he will most likely find love through platonic relationships. That is of course if Anno still intends to end Rebuild on a happy note and not go EoE on us.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 03, 2013 3:58 pm He has to learn to love himself first, which has always been an uphill struggle.

[]: Post by Rei IV » Thu Jan 03, 2013 5:24 pm Mr. Tines wrote: He has to learn to love himself first, which has always been an uphill struggle.
